message:
refactor(tui): density cleanup — replace pipe delimiters with spaced chunks

Removes inline pipe separators from header bars across 6 screens
(reservations, threads, projects, attachments, messages, tui_app palette)
and replaces them with double-space gaps for visual chunking without
delimiter noise.  Information is preserved; scan speed improves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
